description_long: This is an upright piano with a matte black finish, featuring a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The piano has a rectangular, robust body with gently curved side panels and a flat top surface. A matching bench with a cushioned, textured red seat and black wooden legs is positioned in front of the piano. Three gold-colored pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, indicating standard functionality. The front panel above the keys displays a subtle brand or logo marking. The piano is designed for indoor or sheltered urban environments, such as music schools, public spaces, or community centers.
description: A matte black upright piano with a full keyboard, three gold pedals, and a red cushioned bench. The piano features a subtle brand marking and is suitable for urban indoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full keyboard, three gold pedals, and the red cushioned bench.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back panel of the piano.
description_view_2: Side angled view highlighting the piano's curved side profile and the bench's position.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the keyboard, pedals, brand marking, and the bench centered in front.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
